data: {"generalSituation":"With a southerly airstream gradually affecting the coast of Guangdong, the weather will be hot with one or two showers over the region in the next couple of days. Troughs of low pressure are expected to bring unsettled weather to southern China in the middle and latter parts of next week. There will be showers and thunderstorms over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260329","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"East to southeast force 3 to 4, becoming south force 3 later.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with one or two showers.
